title.en: Obviously, he was still far from the strength o...

content.en:
Ye Tian's strength skyrocketed, but he was still not an opponent of the Eternal Dao Realm.

He went to challenge the Mythical Valley's Eternal Dao Realm Strength Mythical Spirit, but he was still easily killed.

Obviously, he was still far from the strength of the Eternal Dao Realm.

However, he didn't need to worry about the threat of the First Demon Venerable.

But except for the mythical spirit in the middle of the mythical valley, the other mythical spirits were stronger than him, but they couldn't stop him, and he could drag them with a few copy bodies, thus robbing them of their treasure resources.

In other words, Ye Tian could almost take away the resources of the entire Mythical Valley.

With so many resources, not only can he advance to the Eternal Dao Extremely High Process, but even his own relatives can also be advanced to the Eternal Dao Extremely High Stage.

It's just that it's still extremely difficult to reach the Eternal Dao realm!

......

To the Dao Void Demon, the Demon Ancient is in the same vein.

Inside the Second Demon Venerable Palace.

Now.

The Second Demon Venerable Demon Immortal is at a critical juncture, and once it is completed, it will step into the process of eternal enlightenment.

With the passage of time, the body of the Demon Immortal gradually began to transform, from mythology to the peak of the Dao realm, and gradually began to become eternal to Dao.

Ultimately.

Rumble!!!!

His body had already begun to transform into an eternal realm, and although it was only the beginning, he could be regarded as having finally broken through!!

"Hahaha, my Demon Immortal has finally broken through and reached the realm of the First Demon Venerable!!!"

Demon Styx said excitedly.

Deep in the veins of the Mogu.

Mo Gu looked at the Demon Immortal: "The Demon Immortal has really reached the Eternal Dao, and I didn't give him any resources, so he did this." "

He was a little jealous of the Demon Immortal at the moment.

Although the Demon Immortal was the first batch of Supreme Dao Void Demons he created with his own blood, and he was considered his heir, he had created a large number of Supreme Dao Void Demons, so he naturally had no feelings.

Moreover, he also knew that some Demon Venerables such as Demon Venerable wanted to take his place and become the First Demon Venerable, so as to master the massive resources of the Demon Ancient Lineage.

However, as long as these Demon Venerables didn't resist him, he still wouldn't kill them.

Besides, it is also a good thing for him to break through at this time!

"Maybe you can invade the Innate Origin Domain Alliance!"

Mogu thought to himself.

Now that the Demon Immortal has completed the Eternal Dao, it is completely possible to kill the other Patriarchs of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and then help him deal with the First Patriarch, with the strength of the two Demon Venerables, it is enough to kill the First Patriarch.

Even if the First Elder was desperate, their injuries would not be too great.

Whether it is him, or the First Patriarch, he hides some secrets, and if he kills the First Patriarch, perhaps with the help of the First Patriarch's secrets, his strength will go further.

"Demon Styx, come here!"

The First Demon Venerable Demon Gu sent a message to the Demon Nether, who had just broken through.

Soon, the demon came.

"I've seen the First Demon Venerable!"

Demon Styx said respectfully.

"Demon Immortal, you have preliminarily carried out the Eternal Dao transformation, congratulations!"

The Ancient Devil's Way.

"Thank you for the cultivation of the First Demon Venerable, otherwise I wouldn't have been able to reach this realm!"

The words of the demon are a bit hypocritical.

But Mogu didn't say anything.

"Demon Immortal, I'm going to invade the Innate Origin Alliance, what do you think?" asked Mogu.

Demon Ming hurriedly said: "It is true that we should invade the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, their strength is much worse than ours, even if we destroy them, we will suffer heavy losses, but as long as we destroy them, we can easily recover in the future." Moreover, we can integrate the resources of the Void Domain, so that more Demon Venerables can be cultivated, and even our own strength can be further improved!"

"Okay, then mobilize the entire Supreme Dao Void Demon Demon Venerable, Demon Lord, and countless Supreme Dao Void Demons to invade the Innate Origin Domain Alliance. Mogu decided, "I'll hold back the First Elder first." You first assist the other Demon Venerables to kill some more elders, and then come and assist me in besieging the first elders. "

"Yes!"

The devil answered.

......

Soon, the Demon Ancient First Pulse mobilized the other Demon Venerables and Demon Lords of the Void Demon First Pulse to gather their strength and prepare to invade the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

And with such a large-scale invasion, the movement was too big, and the elders of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance had been paying attention to the movements of the Demon Ancient Realm, so they naturally noticed it.

At the first time, the first patriarch informed the other patriarchs and prepared to prepare for battle.

Hall of the Senate.

When a venerable patriarch arrives, those who don't have time to come will also be projected.

"Ladies and gentlemen, the Supreme Dao Void Demon side is mobilizing its forces, and it is all mobilized, and it is very likely that it will invade our Innate Origin Domain Alliance. The First Patriarch said.

"Was it a small invasion, or was it a real invasion?"

One of the patriarchs asked.

The First Elder said: "From the current point of view, it is a real full-scale invasion, and the entire Supreme Dao Void Demon has been mobilized, and even those Demon Venerables and Demon Lords who are in retreat have been forcibly summoned. "

Hearing this, many patriarchs panicked.

They really didn't want to fight, after all, the Supreme Dao Void Demon side was much stronger than them!

Seeing that many elders were a little panicked, the First Patriarch hurriedly said, "Don't worry, you don't have to worry, in fact, we have an advantage. "

"We have the ???? advantage"

A group of patriarchs looked left and right, where did the advantage come from, why didn't they find it.

At this time, the First Elder looked at Ye Tian: "Elder Ye Tian has reached my realm, and his clone can also exert such combat power, which is equivalent to many combat power like me." "

When the first patriarch said this, many patriarchs were shocked.

They looked at Ye Tian and wanted to ask if it was true?

"It's true!" Ye Tiandao: "Once the war starts, I will kill those Demon Venerables as soon as possible, and then assist the First Elder to besiege and kill the First Demon Venerable." "

After getting Ye Tian's reply, they breathed a sigh of relief.

However, they don't really trust it, in case Ye Tian and the First Elder bragged and deliberately made them desperate, it was not impossible.

"Prepare for battle, let those Legendary Dao Realms and Ninefold Dao Realms below get ready, and defend one fortress after another!"

The First Elder commanded.

"Yes!"

Many veterans answered.

......

Human domain.

Ye Tian also informed some of the news, a large number of Terrans were guarding the fortresses outside the human domain, and even Ye Tian's wives and daughters had to go to guard them, but now they had cultivated to reach the peak of the Mythical Dao Realm, and they were superimposing all kinds of mythical bodies, and their strength was extremely powerful.

In addition, they also have many innate primordial treasures, and their strength is close to the level of the top thirty-six elders.

In addition, Ye Tian's several replica bodies are guarding here, and their safety will not be a problem.
